other_observers: Seen with finder Dave Silverman, also Glenn Walbek, Margie Joy,Jeannie Mitchell, Lynne Miller, Leon Bright, Clif Smith, Pearle Sandstrom-Smith.  Also seen by Mark Peterson, Lisa Edwards, Stephany McNew, Van, Kristyn, and Benji Truan, Polly and Paul Neldner on 4/5.  Also, seen by Bill Maynard and others on 4/6.
description: I arrived at Lake Beckwith in Colorado City to see Dave Silverman's Brown Pelican.  When I drove to the parking lot near the dam, I saw the bird swimming on the far shore.  I also saw the bird flying around and plunge dive.  The bird was a brown colored pelican shaped bird.  See photos.
photographer: Photographer: Brandon K. Percival, Brandon K. Percival, Brandon K. Percival, Brandon K. Percival, Brandon K. Percival, Brandon K. Percival, Brandon K. Percival
